en.name: Level 12 — Matrix
en.shortDescription: A self-censoring level that blurs all recordings. A single furnished room expands into an infinite white void scattered with furniture.
en.atmosphere: Stark white emptiness that fogs the mind and erodes memory; peaceful yet disorienting, reality fraying with distance from the center.
en.tips: Sit in the original chair ~15 min, try the locked door, enter the copycat door, return, wait exactly one hour, then try the door again.
